title: Green Cursor
description: Green cursors for Cursors Extended mod.
body:
Green cursor for [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) mod.
A great choice for sci-fi, retrofuturism maps and modpacks.

See the gallery for a preview of the cursors.
## Dependencies
This resourcepack requires the [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) mod to work.


by Blue_kod
